sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21045" key="broto/ghrus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βροτό-γηρυς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υ</itype>, <sense id="n21045.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with human voice</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ψιττακός</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0005.tlg001.perseus-grc1:9:562" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.562</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crin.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
